div.head: The Special Representative of the President (Corrigan) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 33. In the conference held this afternoon with the Nicaraguan delegates they declared their readiness to sign a protocol incorporating the points agreed on up to the present time and with respect to the elimination of point No. 6, referred to in my telegram No. 32, of today. They stated the retention or elimination of this point referring to stamps would not alter their willingness to sign.
If this point does not cause delay the protocol is likely to be signed within a few days. The matter of a permanent secretariat is now under discussion.
